domain_experience: 6 years building internal tools for HVAC distributors
understands HVAC quoting, ordering, and operational workflows
familiar with trade-specific operational pain points
assets: live pilot access through brother's HVAC service business
ability to build bespoke tooling without hiring a team
distribution: regional owner network access without needing an audience
network_access: brother runs a small HVAC service business
brother knows many HVAC owners in the region
constraints: should not rely on content-first distribution
best path should validate before building software
time and budget assumed to be limited but not prohibitive
credibility_signals: direct operator access for pilot feedback
can discuss concrete workflows instead of generic AI

opportunities.title: HVAC Revenue Recovery Sprint
opportunities.thesis: Sell a fixed-fee audit plus implementation that recovers lost revenue from missed calls, stale estimates, lapsed memberships, and weak follow-up using AI-assisted analysis and lightweight automation.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user has HVAC workflow knowledge plus warm access to owners, allowing an outcome-led niche offer instead of generic automation consulting.
validation_plan: Run a manual leak audit for brother's shop
Quantify value from one or two leaks
Pitch a 2-week paid sprint to warm intros
tool_specs: CSV import for calls, estimates, and memberships
kill_criteria: Owners do not see recovered revenue as urgent
No paid pilot closes after concrete audit

opportunities.title: HVAC Back-Office Automation Service
opportunities.thesis: Offer done-for-you automation for office and dispatch workflows such as quote follow-up, technician note processing, task routing, and owner reporting.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user already understands the data and workflow mess behind HVAC operations, which reduces discovery time and improves implementation quality.
validation_plan: Interview 3 owners about repetitive office bottlenecks
Pilot with a single workflow before broader scope
kill_criteria: Work is too custom across shops to repeat
Automation savings are hard to quantify

opportunities.title: HVAC Service Funnel Benchmark Dashboard
opportunities.thesis: Turn implementation data into a subscription benchmark dashboard showing where a shop is leaking revenue relative to peers.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user can source real domain-specific metrics from early service engagements instead of inventing a generic dashboard in a vacuum.
validation_plan: Collect common metrics across first 2-3 pilots
Test whether owners care more about benchmark visibility or action workflows
Pre-sell dashboard reporting as an add-on
kill_criteria: Data access is inconsistent across shops
Owners value action more than benchmarks

opportunities.title: Replacement Estimate Follow-Up Copilot
opportunities.thesis: Build software that tracks open replacement estimates, drafts personalized follow-ups, and shows owners where deals are going stale.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user can design around the real quoting and follow-up friction in HVAC rather than building a generic sales assistant.
validation_plan: Measure open-estimate aging in pilot shop
kill_criteria: Estimate process varies too widely to standardize early
Users only want service, not software

opportunities.title: Revenue Recovery Concierge to Micro-SaaS
opportunities.thesis: Start as a monthly revenue recovery service for missed calls, stale estimates, and lapsed memberships; automate repeatable workflows; then productize the dashboard and workflow engine into a micro-SaaS.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: This path uses the user's strongest assets at once: HVAC domain fluency, a live pilot, warm owner introductions, and the ability to build tooling after learning what repeats.
validation_plan: Pilot with brother's shop using manual exports
Close one additional paid pilot through warm intro
Track which leak category produces the clearest ROI
tool_specs: Opportunity queue for missed calls, open estimates, and lapsed memberships
CSV ingest and later system connectors
Owner dashboard with dollar value, aging, and status
kill_criteria: Fewer than 5 warm owner conversations in 2 weeks
No paid pilot after showing a leak audit
No repeatable workflow emerges after 2-3 pilots
Value is perceived as admin help rather than revenue recovery

opportunities.title: Dispatcher Copilot Service to SaaS
opportunities.thesis: Offer a dispatcher-assist service that summarizes calls, flags urgency, drafts follow-up, and tracks unbooked opportunities, then package the console as software.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user understands HVAC ops and can design a focused dispatcher workflow instead of selling a generic AI assistant.
validation_plan: Shadow intake workflow in pilot shop
Measure missed booking and callback rates
Offer manual dispatcher support before software
kill_criteria: Owners resist using AI in live customer communication
Operational gains are too hard to prove

next_actions: Interview brother and map top revenue leaks
Run a manual audit on his shop data
Create a one-page offer for a revenue recovery sprint
Use brother's network for 5 warm owner conversations
Close one paid pilot before building product
